items: Health and Wellness Program Report — overview of RCSD Health & Wellness Dept, collaborative ecosystems with families/healthcare providers, Sequoia Healthcare District grant. Speakers: Patrinia Redd (Director), Phoebe Reid-Chambers (Lead Nurse), Lisa Cox (Lead Nurse)
California Reading Literacy Project (CRLP) Presentation — professional learning on scaffolding complex text, LCAP goal #3 for ELA Academics. Speaker: Anna Herrera, Asst. Superintendent of Ed Services
Approval of December 13, 2025 Board Meeting Minutes
Measure U Addenda — Taft Community School ($126,135) and Clifford School ($253,304)
Personnel Increase: 0.5 FTE Special Education Preschool Teacher ($90K/yr) at Garfield
Agreement with County of San Mateo — $200K Get Healthy San Mateo wellness grant (2025-2027)
EPAR for CSPS Classroom Assessment Consultant ($9,100)
Resolution No. 15 — Ed Code Option for Teaching Assignment — annual approval of Local Assignment Options
Declaration of Need for Fully Qualified Educators 2026-2027
Quarterly Williams Report Q2 (Oct–Dec 2025) — no complaints, district in compliance

llmResponse.consent_vote_words: I'll move that we approve the consent agenda as submitted
